# Module map

## renderer — 浏览器渲染层与用户交互
- Entry: `src/renderer/app.js`
- Owns (prod): `src/renderer/**`
- Tests: `test/renderer/**`
- Checks: `unit`
- Validation gates: `renderer-user-flow`
- Test touch: `required`

## desktop-runtime — Electron main / preload 与窗口生命周期
- Entry: `electron/main/index.cjs`, `electron/preload/index.cjs`
- Owns (prod): `electron/main/**`, `electron/preload/**`
- Tests: `test/electron/**`
- Checks: `unit`
- Validation gates: `desktop-process-flow`
- Test touch: `required`

## shared-ipc — renderer 与桌面进程共享的 IPC 契约
- Entry: `src/shared/ipc.cjs`
- Owns (prod): `src/shared/**`
- Tests: `test/shared/**`
- Checks: `unit`
- Validation gates: `renderer-user-flow`, `desktop-process-flow`
- Test touch: `required`

# Validation gates

Project-defined mandatory proof obligations. Profiles may replace ordinary module checks, but they cannot bypass these gates.

## renderer-user-flow — renderer 改动必须通过真实浏览器用户路径，不能只跑组件单测
- Mandatory checks: `renderer-e2e`
- Acceptance tests: `e2e/renderer/**`
- Acceptance test touch: `required`

## desktop-process-flow — main/preload/IPC 改动必须通过真实 Electron 进程回归
- Mandatory checks: `electron-e2e`
- Acceptance tests: `e2e/electron/**`
- Acceptance test touch: `required`
